info.name: Vehicle Rental System Backend Tests
info.description: Postman collection for exercising the Capstone_VehicleRentalSystem backend. Run the full collection from `1. Auth` downward and it will generate fresh users, plates, tokens, and chained IDs automatically for each run.

item.name: 1. Auth
item.description: Creates two test users, logs them in, and verifies happy and fail scenarios for authentication endpoints.

request.description: Creates a unique customer account for this collection run.
